name: JoAi: Update Skill

description.en: Edit the name, description, or content of an existing agent skill.
description.de: Bearbeite den Namen, die Beschreibung oder den Inhalt einer bestehenden Agenten-Fähigkeit.
description.es: Edit the name, description, or content of an existing agent skill.
description.fr: Edit the name, description, or content of an existing agent skill.
description.ro: Edit the name, description, or content of an existing agent skill.
description.it: Edit the name, description, or content of an existing agent skill.

bot: Use this to refine or correct an existing skill. If the user refers to a skill by name, list skills first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Skill ID

description.en: The ID of the skill to update
description.de: Die ID der zu aktualisierenden Fähigkeit
description.es: The ID of the skill to update
description.fr: The ID of the skill to update
description.ro: The ID of the skill to update
description.it: The ID of the skill to update

inputs.bot: The skill hash ID. If the user refers to a skill by name, list skills first to find the matching ID.
A new concise name for this skill, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Updated description of what this skill does
description.de: Aktualisierte Beschreibung, was diese Fähigkeit tut
description.es: Updated description of what this skill does
description.fr: Updated description of what this skill does
description.ro: Updated description of what this skill does
description.it: Updated description of what this skill does

inputs.bot: A brief updated description of when and how this skill should be used.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: Updated instructions or knowledge for this skill
description.de: Aktualisierte Anweisungen oder Wissen für diese Fähigkeit
description.es: Updated instructions or knowledge for this skill
description.fr: Updated instructions or knowledge for this skill
description.ro: Updated instructions or knowledge for this skill
description.it: Updated instructions or knowledge for this skill

inputs.bot: Updated detailed instructions, templates, or knowledge for this skill.
